mapper.sql: course_id, course_code, course_name, credit, capacity, selected_count, status, description, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET course_name = #{courseName}, credit = #{credit}, capacity = #{capacity}, status = #{status}, description = #{description} WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND #{capacity} >= selected_count
UPDATE course SET selected_count = selected_count + 1 WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND status = 'OPEN' AND selected_count < capacity
UPDATE course SET selected_count = selected_count - 1 WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND selected_count > 0
